title: WATERFrAMES: Create Integration
description: Rework recipes from WATERFrAMES to use crafting ingredients from Create
body: Rework WATERFrAMES recipes to use crafting ingredients from the Create mod, with a slightly more logical recipe tree. Useful for preserving progression and immersion when including WATERFrAMES in a modpack where it would otherwise be out of place. Works well with [Create: Logical Nixie Tube Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-logical-nixie-tube-recipe).
